results.rendered_html:
kokilaḥ, -lā [kuk-ilac  Uṇ. 1. 54 ]
1 The (Indian or black) cuckoo; puṃskokilo yanmadhuraṃ cukūja  Ku. 3. 32 ; 4. 16 ;  R. 12. 39. 
2 A fire-brand.
Comp.
— āvāsaḥ, -utsavaḥ the mango tree.
— ikṣuḥ a kind of sugar cane.
